task: Evaluate and Import Useful Claude Markdown Skills to MidpointX

key_patterns_discovered: MidpointX can seamlessly ingest cognitive workflows originally designed for Claude by adopting their markdown 'skills'.

We imported key skills (mcp-builder, webapp-testing, artifacts-builder, and file-organizer), which will be natively picked up by PluginRegistry.initMDSkills() to dynamically add tools outlining these procedures to the agent's context.
